eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 10:00 AM on JUN 12, 2026 Effective until 6:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Gilbert Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Gilbert Police Department is looking for Keith Edwards last seen on foot near Cooper Road and Warner Road, in Gilbert, Arizona. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
